# home

Entry-point app: a launcher grid of all installed apps, shown at `/home`. The
root path `/` redirects here. The grid renders one card per registered
`Apps.App` (via the generic `Apps.App.useContributions()` collection API), and a
trailing dashed "+" card rendered via `viewOptions.gallery.showCreateCard` (part
of the `data-view` `creators` abstraction). The card and the matching toolbar
button both fire the `new-app` creator's `onSelect`, which is currently a stub —
no create-app flow exists yet.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Home — app launcher and entry point.
- Sub-plugins:
  - **`app-cards`** — Launcher grid of one card per installed app, plus the new-app placeholder.
  - **`shell`** — App shell for Home. Registers the /home app entry and defines the Home.Section slot.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
